results.title: hephaestus-panel01-full
results.prompt: Render this storyboard panel as a finished, standalone, full-frame cinematic image: wide establishing shot of the cavernous forge, the long line of gold automata receding to a vanishing point, the smith small at his station lower left. Match the art style, palette, the bearded blond smith Hephaestus, and the gold automata of the reference. ONE single full image only — no grid, no panels, no borders, no text, no labels, no captions.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Match the exact painterly cinematic concept-art style, palette, color, and rendering of the reference image — cool electric blue and violet shadow, warm gold automata, orange spark-light, volumetric haze, visible brushwork. Reproduce its look precisely.
